summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No shared canonical was selected because the job is explicitly not a dedupe cluster. Security-sensitive PRs are scoped to route_security; unrelated non-security PRs are kept independent for normal maintainer or proof-driven follow-up. No close, merge, label, comment, or fix action is planned.

actions.reason: Independent Windows scheduled-task update fix remains open but is not closable or merge-ready because real behavior proof is missing.
Independent logging-level PR should stay open for normal maintainer handling; merge is blocked by missing merge preflight in this plan-only shard.
Maintainer-owned draft with active author follow-up and unresolved review findings should stay open independently; no close or merge action is safe.
Security-sensitive trusted-policy/JWT capability work is out of scope for Clownfish backlog cleanup and should be routed to central OpenClaw security handling.
Independent Telegram delivery PR has useful code and proof context but is draft and lacks merge clearance, so it should remain open.
Independent session-store locking PR remains blocked on requested behavior proof; not low-signal or superseded from the hydrated evidence.
Related to open issue #87889, but fixed-by-candidate closeout is blocked by failing proof and lack of merge readiness.
Independent agent error-surfacing PR may be useful but is not merge-ready under the merge policy in this plan-only shard.
Security-boundary/auth-provider changes are scoped out of Clownfish cleanup and should be routed to central OpenClaw security handling.
Broad desktop/native gateway, dependency, credential-handling, and security-boundary work is out of scope for Clownfish backlog cleanup and should go to central security/maintainer handling.
